name: work-checkpoints
title: Work Checkpoints
description: Quick checkpoint logger for time tracking. Log what you're working on and let your AI assistant build your timesheet.
author: rodrigoarias

commands.name: add-checkpoint
commands.title: Add Checkpoint
commands.subtitle: Work Checkpoints
commands.description: Quickly log what you're currently working on.

commands.name: list-checkpoints
commands.title: List Checkpoints
commands.subtitle: Work Checkpoints
commands.description: View, edit, and manage today's work checkpoints.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
